report_name: The AI Sword: Anthropic Model Demonstrates Hacking Prowess Surpassing Human Experts

attack_patterns.name: Search Open Websites/Domains
attack_patterns.description: The AI model performs a function analogous to searching open sources by programmatically searching for patterns indicative of vulnerabilities within vast codebases.

attack_patterns.name: Develop Capabilities
attack_patterns.description: The AI model is capable of not just finding flaws, but also generating the code required to exploit them, effectively developing new exploit capabilities.

attack_patterns.name: Obtain Capabilities
attack_patterns.description: The AI model automates the discovery of zero-day vulnerabilities by analyzing codebases, effectively obtaining vulnerability information as a capability.

attack_patterns.name: Automated Collection
attack_patterns.description: The AI agent works 24/7, analyzing vast amounts of code and identifying thousands of vulnerabilities across multiple platforms simultaneously.

tools.name: Claude Mythos Preview
tools.description: An advanced AI model from Anthropic that can autonomously find and exploit software vulnerabilities at a scale and speed surpassing most human security experts.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: A leading AI company that developed the Claude Mythos Preview model, which has demonstrated advanced vulnerability discovery and exploitation capabilities.
